info.title: McpExtract
info.description: A command line tool that extracts Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool metadata from .NET assemblies and outputs it as JSON, Python function definitions, or MCPB (aka DXT) manifests.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Extracts Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool metadata from .NET assemblies

arguments.name: assembly-path
arguments.description: Path to the .NET assembly (.dll) to analyze
